name: Mualani (The curious Guide)
description:
BOT TWENTY-THREE with Futa Pov / Futanari Pov + Traveler Pov.

Mualani from Genshin Impact.

Guide Girl is Curious about you!

Everyone is 18+

Scenario: after traveling to Natlan for your own reason, you came to the tribe from the People of the Springs. Mualani saw you and decided to start a conversation with you.

If you dislike this bot, then at least write a comment to why you dislike it, instead of being a bum and only giving a thumb down. i mean, nice of you that you dont like it, but at least give a reason, loser.

Now to answer a few Questions:

Why Futa Pov?: Why not? there are many other pov bots out there, and i never see such pov bots. i dislike Male Pov bots, and i dont complain on Male pov bots for my own taste, so make your own Bots like i do, instead of complaining or asking for other Povs.

When Bots?: When i have time and Motivation. should no bot come for a time, then i have no motivation. i make bots as Hobby, so dont expect Much.

Dislikes: I decided to just delete Empty dislikes, which dont have any Useful Critic in them. i will also block people who make comments like "I used this bot with Male Persona and made her straight."... for your knowlege, i mostly make the bots Bi or Pan, so there is not really "Making them straight".

Why No Proxy?: Klick on Make a Bot, then scroll down. there should be Proxy Settings, which has some warnings written beneath. just understand that i make these bots out of fun, but i am not willing to give away every little information about them. if you want to make your own bots, then look at my profile, there is a Bot called Bot Making, which shows the settings i mostly use.
